title: No End Flash
description: Perfect for players who are sensitive to vibrant lights or simply want to say goodbye to that effect!
body:
![NoEndFlash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d26d9530930ad209c8fa8de4e6d220b950f62a_0.webp)
# No End Flash😵

Are you **tired** of the **End Flashes** effect, the pink light effect from **Vibrant Visuals** and its continuously appearing sound every time you're in **The End**?  
This resource pack **completely removes** the pink light effect and its sound, providing a **more comfortable** experience for your eyes.

**📝 Features**
- Removes the pink light effect and sound of End Flashes when in The End
- Provides a more comfortable gaming experience

**✔️ Compatibility**
- No mods required (works with Vanilla)
- Compatible with other resource packs
